3034060.name: Virtudio
3034060.description:
Virtudio Finally landing

Become a new Vtuber with high-quality characters!

Features provided
  • Support iphone Arkit face tracking
  • Full body tracking using motion capture equipment
  • Provides facial expression and movement presets to express mood without a iPhone or motion capture equipment.
  • Provides the ability to interact with fans (prop throwing, chat throwing)
  • Create your own high-quality 3D character
  • Provides customizable 3D space and high-quality completed preset space
  • Do you have any other great thoughts? Then, please email us to inquire about the features you want!

virtudio is only available on Windows.
3034060.supported_languages: 韩语, 英语, 日语
